narrative:
Urbana Township has 9,035 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
